title: FTS n-character prefix query returns incorrect results when using an n+1 character prefix index.
key_bug_features: n-character prefix query with n+1 character index
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE fts_table USING fts5(content TEXT);
CREATE INDEX idx_content_prefix ON fts_table(content COLLATE NOCASE);
SELECT * FROM fts_table WHERE content MATCH 'app*';
SELECT * FROM fts_table WHERE content MATCH 'appl*';
